title: rosa reticulata var. genuina
intro: Rosa reticulata var. genuina, also known as the Reticulated Rose or Chinese Rose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rosa reticulata var. genuina include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Rosa reticulata var. genuina is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health problems.
